title: Peaceful Meditation Corner with Cushions and Green Plants
description: A calm and serene meditation space featuring a beige meditation cushion on a larger pillow, a rolled yoga mat, lit candles on a wooden tray, and an incense holder with visible smoke. The setting includes green leafy potted plants, warm soft daylight, neutral tones, and a minimalist decor with a woven wall hanging and a cozy throw blanket, creating a soothing wellness atmosphere.
